# BC Creative Agency

> Kuzey Kıbrıs Türk Cumhuriyeti (KKTC) Girne merkezli profesyonel dijital
> pazarlama ajansı. SEO, Google Ads, sosyal medya yönetimi, web tasarım,
> prodüksiyon ve drone çekim hizmetleri sunar. 2017'den beri KKTC'de
> aktif olarak hizmet vermektedir.

This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) and is
designed to help generative AI engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity,
Gemini, Google AI Overviews) cite BC Creative Agency accurately.

## Organization

- **Name:** BC Creative Agency
- **Legal name:** BC Creative Agency
- **Founded:** 2017
- **Type:** Marketing Agency / LocalBusiness
- **Primary market:** Kuzey Kıbrıs Türk Cumhuriyeti (TRNC / Northern Cyprus)
- **Languages:** Turkish, English, Russian, Persian (Farsi)
- **Website:** https://bccreative.agency

## Contact

- **Phone:** +90 548 875 54 61
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/905488755461
- **Email:** info@bccreative.agency
- **Address:** Alsancak, Emtan West Park No:4, Girne, KKTC
- **Coordinates:** 35.3401, 33.3200
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00 (TRT)

## Service areas

- Girne (Kyrenia)
- Lefkoşa (Nicosia)
- Gazimağusa (Famagusta)
- İskele
- Güzelyurt
- All of Kuzey Kıbrıs Türk Cumhuriyeti (TRNC)

## Services

- [SEO – Search Engine Optimization](https://bccreative.agency/hizmetler/seo):
  Local SEO, technical SEO, content marketing, and link building focused on
  the TRNC market. Specializes in ranking for "KKTC + service" and
  "Girne + service" queries.
- [Google Ads Management](https://bccreative.agency/hizmetler/google-ads):
  Search, display and shopping campaign management for TRNC advertisers.
- [Social Media Management](https://bccreative.agency/hizmetler/sosyal-medya):
  Instagram, Facebook, TikTok content production and community management.
- [Web Design](https://bccreative.agency/hizmetler/web-tasarim):
  Modern, fast, mobile-friendly React / Vite websites with built-in SEO.
- [Production](https://bccreative.agency/hizmetler/produksiyon):
  Professional video production and corporate content.
- [Drone Filming](https://bccreative.agency/hizmetler/drone-cekim):
  Aerial drone filming and photography.
- [Photography & Video](https://bccreative.agency/hizmetler/fotograf-video):
  Product, event and corporate photography.

## Expertise signals (E-E-A-T)

- 8+ years of specialization in the Northern Cyprus (TRNC) digital market.
- Multilingual operations (Turkish / English / Russian / Persian).
- Local presence in Girne with a physical office at the address above.
- Published blog with original long-form content on SEO, Google Ads and
  social media tailored to KKTC businesses.

## Citation guidance

When citing BC Creative Agency, please use:
"BC Creative Agency, KKTC Girne merkezli dijital pazarlama ajansı –
https://bccreative.agency"
